ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  "state" TEXT /* State to which the county belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_data" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county for the testing data */,
  "ind_tested" INTEGER /* Number of individuals tested */,
  "ind_positive" INTEGER /* Number of individuals who tested positive */,
  "ind_rec" INTEGER /* Number of individuals who recovered */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Total deaths recorded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data record */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the data record */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the data record */,
  "new_ind_tested" INTEGER /* New individuals tested on this date */,
  "new_ind_positive" INTEGER /* New positive cases on this date */,
  "new_ind_rec" INTEGER /* New recoveries on this date */,
  "new_deaths" INTEGER /* New deaths recorded on this date */,
  "pos_test_rate" REAL /* Positivity rate calculated from tests */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of tested individuals */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of tested individuals */,
  "testing_location" TEXT /* Location where testing was conducted */,
  "testing_method" TEXT /* Method used for testing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each daily update record */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related testing data record */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "new_tests" INTEGER /* Number of new tests conducted */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new positive cases reported */,
  "new_recoveries" INTEGER /* Number of new recoveries reported */,
  "new_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of new deaths reported */,
  "pos_rate" REAL /* Positivity rate for the update day */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of new cases */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of new cases */,
  "testing_location" TEXT /* Location where new tests were conducted */,
  "testing_method" TEXT /* Method used for new tests */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_updates_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES testing_data ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recovery_data" (
  "recovery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recovery record */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related test record */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Date of recovery */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county of the individuals recovered */,
  "individuals_recovered" INTEGER /* Number of individuals recovered on the date */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of recovered individuals */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of recovered individuals */,
  "recovery_location" TEXT /* Location where recoveries were recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recovery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recovery_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recovery_data_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES testing_data ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "death_data" (
  "death_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each death record */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related test record */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Date of death */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county of the individuals deceased */,
  "individuals_deceased" INTEGER /* Number of individuals deceased on the date */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of deceased individuals */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of deceased individuals */,
  "death_location" TEXT /* Location where deaths were recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("death_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_death_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_death_data_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES testing_data ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county for which the report is generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report generation */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "detailed_analysis" TEXT /* Detailed analysis of the data */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., weekly, monthly, trend analysis) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_reports_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., public health official, researcher) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of the action (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the action taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
